title: A Forbidden World
description: A World that does not belong here, it's story already end, there's nothing left to see
body:
This place have already live, you shouldn't go in it, nothing should be in it, the past need to be forgotten, it's to dangerous to remember it.

Mod originally made for a private SMP, but I've decided to add more things so it can be an independent mod.
There's still a bit of work, but I want to go back to an other project for a bit before finishing this one.

(Screenshots will be added to the page soon, I just don't want to spoil the member of the SMP mentionned previously for the moment)

Things planned to add, upgrade or fix:
- Make the overworld structure
- Change the structure in the dimension to use the new wood (at the moment, use an other modded wood, so the blocks don't load without the right mod)
- Add more creature
- A bit of polish on the current things
- And probably more stuffs
